exceptions.reason: The one-shot data initializer needs ownership capabilities to prepare the persistent Synapse data volume.
mitigations: Only CHOWN, DAC_OVERRIDE, and FOWNER are granted to the initializer.
The long-running Synapse service is read-only and runs as UID 991.

exceptions.reason: The one-shot initializer assigns persistent Synapse data to the non-root application identity.
mitigations: The root initializer exits before Synapse starts.
The network service runs as UID 991 with a read-only root filesystem.
